releases.summary: Install once on the printing computer, then the MSCQR Connector starts automatically in the background.
notes: Use the Mac package on the Mac that is connected to the printer.
Use the Windows test package only for internal validation on the Windows PC that is connected to the printer.
Windows installation now verifies local printer readiness before claiming success and opens Printer Setup automatically when attention is still needed.

windows.label: Windows test package
notes: Extract the ZIP test package on the Windows computer that will print.
Run Install Connector.cmd once to install, auto-start, and locally verify the connector.
Windows Smart App Control can block this unsigned test package until a signed Windows installer is published.
